text.tspan: Annual granted patents related to artificial intelligence, by industry,
Patents related to artificial intelligence first submitted in the selected country's patent office. Subsequent granting of that patent
could be by any country's patent office.
Data source: Center for Security and Emerging Technology (2024)
Note: According to calculations by CSET, the median time for a patent to be granted is 826 days from its initial filing date, while the average
